title: [State Name] Well Plugging Tracker | CAPIT
description: Review [State Name] well-plugging records, source definitions, recent activity, and CAPIT publication notes.
headline: [State Name] Well Plugging Tracker
body: Track published records, recent CAPIT verification activity, and the agency definitions that shape this state’s numbers.

sections.heading: State Snapshot
sections.body: This page summarizes the current published record count, recent additions, source freshness, and any known exclusions or coverage limits for [State Name].

sections.heading: Recent Verified Records
sections.body: Review the newest published records for this state with source IDs, dates, and provenance links. If revisions are part of the source history, CAPIT should show them.

sections.heading: Source Agency and Definition
sections.body: In [State Name], CAPIT follows the source agency’s published definition and status language for the records shown on this page. If CAPIT normalizes that language into a sitewide taxonomy, both the original source term and the CAPIT display term should remain visible.
bullets: Source system: [Database, dashboard, CSV, GIS map, or API]
Revision policy: [How source changes are handled]

sections.heading: Caveat
sections.body: State numbers are not always comparable one-to-one. Definitions, publication practices, and update cadences differ across agencies and jurisdictions.
